title: Foundation: compliance types, feature flag, SCAN_MODULES metadata
acceptance_criteria: types.ts: add ComplianceContext { accessibilityScore?: number; accessibilityScoreSource?: 'lab'|'unavailable'; renderMode?: 'headless'|'fetch-only' } and ComplianceResult { findings: RawFinding[]; frameworkSummary: ComplianceFrameworkSummary } where ComplianceFrameworkSummary is a NON-numeric structure: Array<{ framework: string; signals: Array<{ label: string; status: 'observed'|'not-observed'|'not-evaluated' }> }> — NO score/number/fraction fields anywhere
types.ts: add optional `complianceFrameworkSummary?: ComplianceFrameworkSummary` to ScannerResult (optional for back-compat)

features.ts: add `complianceScanning` to defaultFeatures (true), to the exported features object with a JSDoc line, to customFeatures wiring, to isFeatureReady switch (mirrors seoScanning: ready === enabled), and to getFeatureStatus map
data.ts: add P5-01..P5-06 entries to SCAN_MODULES with id/name/plainName following the existing P1 row style
npm run lint and npm run build pass; flag-off behaviour unchanged (no runtime wiring added here)
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
